title: Golden Globes 2026 Prediction Scores and Expert Analysis
text: Gold Derby released comprehensive prediction scores for the 2026 Golden Globe Awards nominations. User Luketheu led all participants with a 91% accuracy rate, correctly predicting 71 of 78 film nomination slots through strategic Super Bets earning 39,794 points. For editor rankings in film categories, Marcus James Dixon achieved the highest editorial score at 85.9%, followed by Denton Davidson and Kevin P. Sullivan at 84.6%. In expert analysis, Cole Jaeger (The Oscar Expert) topped expert predictions with 89.7% accuracy, trailed by Mark Johnson, Wilson Morales, and Matt Neglia all at 87.2%. For television predictions across 72 nomination slots, Debra Birnbaum led editors with 80.6% accuracy. Among industry experts, Thelma Adams scored 75%, while Kristen Baldwin, Bill Desowitz, and Wilson Morales each achieved 73.6%. Nearly 3,000 film predictors and approximately 1,800 TV forecasters participated, with the highest-scoring user correctly identifying several surprising nominations.
